items.title_en: S&P 500 ticks higher as oil falls and traders await Nvidia’s earnings: Live updates
items.title_zh: 随着油价下跌和交易员等待 Nvidia 的财报，标准普尔 500 指数走高：实时更新
items.desc_en: Chipmaker and AI darling Nvidia will report first-quarter earnings after Wednesday's closing bell.
items.desc_zh: 芯片制造商和人工智能宠儿英伟达将在周三收盘后公布第一季度收益。

items.title_en: Jeff Bezos says bottom half of earners should pay zero in income taxes
items.title_zh: 杰夫·贝佐斯表示，收入最低的一半人应该缴纳零所得税
items.desc_en: Amazon executive chairman Jeff Bezos on Wednesday called for zero federal income taxes on the bottom half of earners.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊执行董事长杰夫·贝索斯周三呼吁对收入最低的一半人实行零联邦所得税。

items.title_en: Fanatics to launch first credit card as part of broader deal with American Express
items.title_zh: Fanatics将推出第一张信用卡，作为与美国运通更广泛交易的一部分
items.desc_en: Fanatics is planning to put a credit card in the wallets of sports fans, allowing them to earn rewards to get team merch, trading cards and collectibles.
items.desc_zh: Fanatics 计划将信用卡放入体育迷的钱包中，让他们能够赚取奖励来购买球队商品、交易卡和收藏品。

items.title_en: College career path ‘over’ as skilled trade get 30% pay bump, recruitment giant says
items.title_zh: 招聘巨头称，随着技术贸易加薪30%，大学职业道路“结束”
items.desc_en: "I would say you can make a good career and good money in skilled trade. That's definitely a career track," CEO of world's largest recruitment firm told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: 全球最大招聘公司的首席执行官告诉 CNBC：“我想说，你可以在技术贸易中获得一份不错的职业生涯并赚到很多钱。这绝对是一条职业道路。”

items.title_en: Fading the tech boom, hedge funds just dumped stocks in record numbers
items.title_zh: 科技热潮消退，对冲基金抛售股票数量创历史新高
items.desc_en: Hedge funds are not waiting around for Nvidia's results Wednesday night.
items.desc_zh: 对冲基金不会等待周三晚上英伟达的业绩。

items.title_en: Could Trump Accounts be a model for Social Security? Here's what experts say
items.title_zh: 特朗普账户可以成为社会保障的典范吗？这是专家的说法
items.desc_en: New Trump Accounts for children could "become Social Security personal accounts," Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, recently said. Here's what experts say.
items.desc_zh: 德克萨斯州共和党参议员特德·克鲁兹最近表示，新的特朗普儿童账户可能“成为社会保障个人账户”。这是专家的说法。

items.title_en: More car buyers are shifting to EVs — but the reasons why are nuanced
items.title_zh: 越来越多的汽车购买者转向电动汽车——但原因很微妙
items.desc_en: Trade in data from Edmunds shows more car buyers are choosing EVs, as fuel prices spike. But other factors might be holding back demand.
items.desc_zh: 埃德蒙兹的交易数据显示，随着燃油价格飙升，越来越多的汽车购买者开始选择电动汽车。但其他因素可能会抑制需求。

items.title_en: More die of suspected Ebola as WHO warns that numbers will rise further
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织警告称，更多人死于疑似埃博拉病毒，死亡人数将进一步上升
items.desc_en: In its latest update, the World Health Organization says there have now been 139 suspected deaths and 600 cases.
items.desc_zh: 世界卫生组织在最新更新中表示，目前已有 139 例疑似死亡病例和 600 例病例。

items.title_en: Xi basks in spotlight as he hosts Putin days after Trump
items.title_zh: 习近平在特朗普当选几天后接待普京，成为众人瞩目的焦点
items.desc_en: Two presidential visits days apart is how Xi Jinping wants the world to see him: talking to everyone, tied to no-one.
items.desc_zh: 相隔几天的两次国家主席访问是习近平希望世界看到他的方式：与所有人交谈，不与任何人挂钩。

items.title_en: Rising mortgage rates cause surge in demand for riskier loans
items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率上升导致对高风险贷款的需求激增
items.desc_en: Mortgage rates continued to rise last week, causing more borrowers to head to adjustable-rate loans, which are cheaper but considered riskier.
items.desc_zh: 上周抵押贷款利率继续上升，导致更多借款人转向可调整利率贷款，这种贷款更便宜，但被认为风险更高。

items.title_en: Lithuania's leaders take shelter during drone air alert
items.title_zh: 立陶宛领导人在无人机空中警报期间避难
items.desc_en: Flights were suspended and people were urged to take shelter after a suspected drone was detected near the Belarus border.
items.desc_zh: 在白俄罗斯边境附近发现疑似无人机后，航班暂停，并敦促人们避难。

items.title_en: Target beats Wall Street estimates, hikes sales outlook as shoppers start to return
items.title_zh: 塔吉特超出华尔街预期，随着购物者开始回归，上调销售前景
items.desc_en: Target has been struggling with a sales slump and decreased customer traffic, though CEO Michael Fiddelke has said the retailer is poised for a turnaround.
items.desc_zh: 塔吉特一直在努力应对销售下滑和客流量减少的问题，但首席执行官迈克尔·菲德尔克表示，该零售商已做好扭亏为盈的准备。

items.title_en: Breakthrough agreement in housing bill gives investors wins
items.title_zh: 住房法案的突破性协议为投资者带来胜利
items.desc_en: The U.S. House is set to approve an updated housing affordability bill after removing industry-opposed requirements on selling build-to-rent homes.
items.desc_zh: 在取消行业反对的出售建房出租房屋的要求后，美国众议院将批准更新的住房负担能力法案。

items.title_en: Stellantis CEO Antonio Filosa is about to unveil his plan to turn the company around as the automaker's stock lags
items.title_zh: Stellantis 首席执行官安东尼奥·菲洛萨 (Antonio Filosa) 即将公布他的计划，以扭转公司局面，因为该汽车制造商的股价落后
items.desc_en: Shares of Stellantis are off nearly 30% since Antonio Filosa, a veteran who climbed through the company ranks, was named CEO nearly a year ago.
items.desc_zh: 自近一年前在公司晋升的资深人士安东尼奥·菲洛萨 (Antonio Filosa) 被任命为首席执行官以来，Stellantis 的股价已下跌近 30%。

items.title_en: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。

items.title_en: Lowe's beats Wall Street expectations against 'challenging' housing backdrop
items.title_zh: 在“充满挑战”的房地产背景下，劳氏公司超出了华尔街的预期
items.desc_en: Lowe's beat Wall Street expectations for its fiscal first-quarter earnings and reaffirmed its full-year guidance.
items.desc_zh: 劳氏公司第一财季盈利超出了华尔街预期，并重申了全年指引。

items.title_en: Democrats make demands of U.S. Trade Representative ahead of U.S.-Mexico-Canada Agreement review
items.title_zh: 民主党在美国-墨西哥-加拿大协议审查之前向美国贸易代表提出要求
items.desc_en: CNBC obtained a letter from a group of Senate Democrats to U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer laying out what they want to see in a key trade agreement.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 获得了一群参议院民主党人写给美国贸易代表杰米森·格里尔的一封信，信中阐述了他们希望在一项关键贸易协议中看到的内容。

items.title_en: Trump exerts iron grip on Republican Party with Massie defeated
items.title_zh: 特朗普对共和党实施铁腕控制，马西落选
items.desc_en: Victory over a Republican rebel in Kentucky shows the president's strength but his power comes with risks for the midterms.

items.title_zh: 伊朗威胁称，如果美国和以色列恢复袭击，冲突将扩大到“地区以外”

items.desc_en: We talk to an expert about the risks from AI hackers.
items.desc_zh: 我们与专家讨论了人工智能黑客带来的风险。

items.title_en: Singer Patrick Bruel denies wave of sexual assault allegations in France
items.title_zh: 歌手帕特里克·布鲁埃尔否认在法国发生的性侵犯指控
items.desc_en: Among Bruel's latest accusers is well-known TV and radio presenter Flavie Flament, who alleges he raped her in 1991.
items.desc_zh: 布鲁尔的最新指控者之一是著名电视和广播节目主持人弗拉维·弗拉门特 (Flavie Flament)，她声称布鲁尔于 1991 年强奸了她。

items.title_en: Estonia says Nato jet shot down drone over its territory
items.title_zh: 爱沙尼亚称北约喷气式飞机击落其领土上空的无人机
items.desc_en: Estonia suspects the drone was a Ukrainian projectile knocked off course by Russian electronic jamming.
items.desc_zh: 爱沙尼亚怀疑这架无人机是乌克兰的一枚导弹，由于俄罗斯的电子干扰而偏离了航线。

items.title_en: Key people smuggler arrested after BBC uncovered identity
items.title_zh: BBC 揭露身份后逮捕关键人口走私者
items.desc_en: The 28-year-old's network is thought to have transported thousands of illegal migrants into the UK.
items.desc_zh: 据信，这名 28 岁的人的网络已将数千名非法移民运送到英国。

items.title_en: Thailand cuts visa-free stay period for more than 90 countries including UK
items.title_zh: 泰国缩短英国等90多个国家的免签停留期限
items.desc_en: Many visitors who have been exempt for 60 days will soon have to apply for a visa after 30 days.
items.desc_zh: 许多已经获得 60 天豁免的游客很快就必须在 30 天后申请签证。

items.title_en: Runtime
items.title_zh: Runtime
items.desc_en: Sandboxed coding agents for everyone on your team
items.desc_zh: 适合团队中每个人的沙盒编码代理

items.title_en: Gemini Omni
items.title_zh: Gemini Omni
items.desc_en: Create anything from any input – starting with video
items.desc_zh: 从任何输入创建任何内容 - 从视频开始

items.title_en: Son of Mango boss arrested over father's fatal fall from cliff
items.title_zh: 芒果老板儿子因父亲坠崖身亡被捕
items.desc_en: Isak, 71, died in December 2024 after falling from a ravine while walking in the Montserrat mountains near Barcelona.
items.desc_zh: 71 岁的伊萨克于 2024 年 12 月在巴塞罗那附近的蒙特塞拉特山脉散步时从峡谷坠落身亡。

items.title_en: Father-of-8 security guard hailed as hero in San Diego mosque shooting
items.title_zh: 圣地亚哥清真寺枪击事件中 8 个孩子的父亲保安被誉为英雄
items.desc_en: Amin Abdullah, one of three men killed in the attack, is said to have saved lives in the shooting.
items.desc_zh: 阿明·阿卜杜拉是在袭击中丧生的三名男子之一，据说他在枪击事件中拯救了生命。

items.title_en: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: Zoe Kleinman：为什么人工智能行业是马斯克-奥特曼试验的真正赢家
items.desc_en: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.
items.desc_zh: 加利福尼亚州奥克兰的试验揭开了人工智能领域的面纱，以及该领域核心人物的巨大自负。

items.title_en: Ebola may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织医生警告说，埃博拉病毒的传播速度可能比最初想象的要快
items.desc_en: Hundreds of cases are suspected in central Africa but experts fear the actual number may be much higher.
items.desc_zh: 中部非洲疑似有数百起病例，但专家担心实际数字可能要高得多。

items.title_en: Invenio
items.title_zh: Invenio
items.desc_en: Local AI search for Mac video & photo libraries
items.desc_zh: Mac 视频和照片库的本地 AI 搜索

items.title_en: Glia
items.title_zh: Glia
items.desc_en: Local-first AI memory bridge between browser chats and IDEs
items.desc_zh: 浏览器聊天和 IDE 之间的本地优先 AI 内存桥

items.title_en: Supercut for Agents
items.title_zh: Supercut for Agents
items.desc_en: Permission-aware AI access to recordings and metadata
items.desc_zh: 具有权限感知功能的 AI 对录音和元数据的访问

items.title_en: GhostSnap
items.title_zh: GhostSnap
items.desc_en: Take multiple screenshots that are auto compressed for AI
items.desc_zh: 拍摄多张屏幕截图，并自动压缩以供 AI 使用

items.title_en: Owlish
items.title_zh: Owlish
items.desc_en: Reduce support volume with AI agents trained on your docs
items.desc_zh: 使用经过文档培训的 AI 代理减少支持量

items.title_en: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
items.title_zh: Robo-top：可以为你制作下一件 T 恤的机器
items.desc_en: Most clothes are made in Asia, but new machines could bring some of that work back to the West.
items.desc_zh: 大多数衣服都是在亚洲制造的，但新机器可以将部分工作带回西方。

items.title_en: Satellites and AI used to track UK hedgehogs in bid to slow decline
items.title_zh: 卫星和人工智能用于追踪英国刺猬以减缓其数量下降
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the project will also help to identify barriers preventing hedgehogs from finding food and mates in the wild.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望该项目还能帮助找出刺猬在野外寻找食物和交配的障碍。

items.title_en: Viberia
items.title_zh: Viberia
items.desc_en: Command AI agents like you're playing Civilization
items.desc_zh: 像玩《文明》一样指挥 AI 代理

items.title_en: Multi-Claude
items.title_zh: Multi-Claude
items.desc_en: Run multiple Claude accounts side by side on your Mac
items.desc_zh: 在 Mac 上并排运行多个 Claude 帐户

items.title_en: Elon Musk just lost another lawsuit. Will he keep fighting?
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克刚刚又输掉了另一场官司。他会继续战斗吗？
items.desc_en: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克输给 OpenAI 是一系列法庭失败中的最新一起。

items.title_en: Jury tosses Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI and its boss Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 陪审团驳回埃隆·马斯克对 OpenAI 及其老板萨姆·奥尔特曼的诉讼
items.desc_en: Jurors spent nearly a month hearing and viewing evidence in the high-profile trial, where Musk had accused Altman of "stealing a charity".
items.desc_zh: 陪审员们花了近一个月的时间在这场备受瞩目的审判中听取和查看证据，马斯克在审判中指控奥特曼“窃取慈善机构”。

items.title_en: Skilled
items.title_zh: Skilled
items.desc_en: Dashboard to find agent skills you no longer need
items.desc_zh: 通过仪表板查找您不再需要的代理技能

items.title_en: Emdash
items.title_zh: Emdash
items.desc_en: One app. Every coding agent. Open-source.
items.desc_zh: 一个应用程序。每个编码代理。开源。

items.title_en: Manus Scheduled Tasks 2.0
items.title_zh: Manus Scheduled Tasks 2.0
items.desc_en: Run recurring Manus work inside the same task context
items.desc_zh: 在同一任务上下文中运行重复的 Manus 工作

items.title_en: Type Switch 3.0 for macOS
items.title_zh: Type Switch 3.0 for macOS
items.desc_en: Instant language switching for multilingual Mac users
items.desc_zh: 为多语言 Mac 用户提供即时语言切换

items.title_en: Instant AI answers can trivialise human intelligence, warns Royal Observatory
items.title_zh: 皇家天文台警告说，即时人工智能答案可能会削弱人类智能
items.desc_en: Paddy Rodgers said the Observatory's rich history showed the power of human knowledge and the need to avoid "dependence" on AI.
items.desc_zh: 帕迪·罗杰斯表示，天文台丰富的历史表明了人类知识的力量以及避免“依赖”人工智能的必要性。

items.title_en: Retina
items.title_zh: Retina
items.desc_en: Screen recorder w/ auto-zoom, smooth cursors, + AI graphics
items.desc_zh: 具有自动缩放、平滑光标和 AI 图形功能的屏幕录像机

items.title_en: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
items.title_zh: X 承诺对英国的仇恨和恐怖内容采取更快的行动
items.desc_en: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，在英国最近发生针对犹太社区的犯罪事件后，这些承诺尤为重要。

items.title_en: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: 索赔、反索赔和科技的肮脏一面暴露：我们在马斯克-奥特曼审判中学到的五件事
items.desc_en: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.
items.desc_zh: 正如陪审团审议的那样，这是我们在以两位科技巨头为核心的长达数周的审判中发现的结果。

items.title_en: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
items.title_zh: 走进兰花育种的秘密和利润丰厚的世界
items.desc_en: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.
items.desc_zh: 将新兰花推向市场可能需要十年的时间，因此育种者对其高科技流程保密。

items.title_en: AI could put people off tech jobs and hurt the economy, warns Raspberry Pi boss
items.title_zh: Raspberry Pi 老板警告说，人工智能可能会让人们失业并损害经济
items.desc_en: Eben Upton warns against claims that Artificial Intelligence will destroy vast numbers of computing roles over the coming years.
items.desc_zh: 埃本·厄普顿 (Eben Upton) 对人工智能将在未来几年摧毁大量计算角色的说法提出警告。

items.title_en: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
items.title_zh: 通过在难民系统中更换 Palantir 技术节省了“数百万英镑”
items.desc_en: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，其内部IT系统“更加灵活”，同时满足“高标准”的安全性。

items.desc_zh: AI代理活动的版本控制

items.desc_zh: 摇摇欲坠的道路和其他危险——人工智能能让我们的街道更安全吗？
